category_sources: Official Control D documentation describes ctrld as an open source command-line daemon for Control D DNS configuration.
source_facts.description says ctrld is a multi-protocol DNS forwarding proxy.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and Control D docs use the name ctrld.
docs_sources: Official Control D documentation has a dedicated ctrld command-line daemon page.
Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory and README usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Control-D-Inc/ctrld; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Control D docs and GitHub README describe ctrld as a command-line daemon for DNS configuration.
source_facts.description identifies DNS forwarding proxy functionality.
